nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Arriving in the Pineal Gland, the back of your corpus callosum regulates the sleep and wake cycles.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Where am I? What is this place?

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Roam around the world, get to know Nocturne, and follow the strange feeling until you stumble into something.
